# update_project_public_client query

## 001_select_project_cognito_clients.sql

### SQLの概要

更新対象のpublic clientと現在versionを確認するため、Project Cognito clientを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_cognito_clients`
- `projects`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `actor_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_cognito_client_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `client_type` | `str` | no |
| `cognito_user_pool_id` | `str` | no |
| `app_client_id` | `str` | no |
| `app_client_name` | `str` | no |
| `allowed_oauth_flows` | `dict[str, Any]` | no |
| `base_allowed_scopes` | `dict[str, Any]` | no |
| `access_token_validity` | `int` | no |
| `access_token_unit` | `str` | no |
| `id_token_validity` | `int | None` | yes |
| `id_token_unit` | `str | None` | yes |
| `refresh_token_validity` | `int | None` | yes |
| `refresh_token_unit` | `str | None` | yes |
| `refresh_token_rotation_enabled` | `bool` | no |
| `retry_grace_period_seconds` | `int | None` | yes |
| `enable_token_revocation` | `bool` | no |
| `row_version` | `int` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON p.project_id = c.project_id`
- `JOIN ON pm.project_id = p.project_id AND pm.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE c.project_id = @project_id AND c.client_type = 'PUBLIC_PKCE' AND (p.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR pm.member_role IN ('OWNER', 'ADMIN'))`


## 002_select_project_cognito_client_scopes.sql

### SQLの概要

public client更新後も既存scopeを維持するため、Project Cognito client scopeを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_cognito_client_scopes`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_cognito_client_id` | `UUID` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `project_cognito_client_scope_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_cognito_client_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_scope_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `subscription_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `scope_full_name` | `str` | no |
| `granted_at` | `datetime | None` | yes |

### 条件

- `WHERE pcs.project_cognito_client_id = @project_cognito_client_id`


## 003_update_project_cognito_clients.sql

### SQLの概要

public client設定の更新内容とversionを反映するため、Project Cognito clientを更新する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_cognito_clients`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `access_token_validity` | `int` | no |
| `access_token_unit` | `str` | no |
| `id_token_validity` | `int` | no |
| `id_token_unit` | `str` | no |
| `refresh_token_validity` | `int` | no |
| `refresh_token_unit` | `str` | no |
| `refresh_token_rotation_enabled` | `bool` | no |
| `retry_grace_period_seconds` | `int` | no |
| `enable_token_revocation` | `bool` | no |
| `now` | `datetime` | no |
| `actor_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `project_cognito_client_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `row_version` | `int` | no |

### 戻り値

_なし_

### 条件

- `WHERE project_cognito_client_id = @project_cognito_client_id AND row_version = @row_version`
